message.content:
Thoroughly explore the project at /Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol. I need:

1. Full file listing of src/ directory recursively
2. Contents of src/components/detail/ if it exists (or confirm it doesn't)
3. Contents of src/types.ts if it exists
4. Contents of src/data/ if it exists
5. Contents of src/App.tsx
6. Contents of package.json scripts section
7. Contents of src/components/command_palette/command_palette.tsx
8. Check if there are any Playwright test files

Give me all details.

content.text: I'll systematically explore the project structure and provide you with complete details.

input.description: List all TypeScript/TSX files in src directory

Perfect! Now let me compile the complete summary with all the information gathered: ## Complete Project Exploration Report ### 1. Full File Listing of src/ Directory (Recursive) ``` /Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src ├── App.tsx ├── components/ │ ├── action_panel/ │ │ ├── action_panel.scss │ │ └── action_panel.tsx │ ├── command_palette/ │ │ ├── command_palette.scss │ │ └── command_palette.tsx │ ├── empty_state/ │ │ ├── empty_state.scss │ │ └── empty_state.tsx │ ├── kbd/ │ │ ├── kbd.scss │ │ └── kbd.tsx │ ├── list/ │ │ ├── index.ts │ │ ├── list.scss │ │ ├── list.tsx │ │ ├── list_context.tsx │ │ ├── list_item/ │ │ │ ├── list_item.scss │ │ │ └── list_item.tsx │ │ └── list_section/ │ │ ├── list_section.scss │ │ └── list_section.tsx │ └── search_bar/ │ ├── search_bar.scss │ └── search_bar.tsx ├── main.tsx ├── styles/ │ ├── _tokens.scss │ └── global.scss ├── test_setup.ts └── vite-env.d.ts ``` **Total: 11 directories, 20 files** --- ### 2. src/components/detail/ **DOES NOT EXIST** - This directory is not present in the project. --- ### 3. src/types.ts **DOES NOT EXIST** - No types.ts file in the project. TypeScript types are defined inline within component files using interfaces. --- ### 4. src/data/ **DOES NOT EXIST** - No data directory. The project currently has no data folder. --- ### 5. src/App.tsx ```typescript export function App() { return
lol
; } ``` **Notes:** The App component is minimal and currently serves as a placeholder. --- ### 6. Package.json Scripts Section ```json { "scripts": { "build": "vite build", "dev": "vite", "test": "vitest run --passWithNoTests", "test:watch": "vitest --watch --passWithNoTests", "coverage": "vitest --coverage", "check": "run-s check:*", "check:types": "tsc --noEmit", "check:lint": "eslint src --fix", "check:format": "prettier --write ." } } ``` **Key Details:** - Package manager: **Bun 1.3.6** - Node requirement: >=20.0.0 - Build tool: Vite 6 - Testing: Vitest - No Playwright script configured (tests run with vitest, not Playwright) --- ### 7. src/components/command_palette/command_palette.tsx ```typescript import { type ReactNode } from 'react'; import './command_palette.scss'; interface CommandPaletteProps { children: ReactNode; } export function CommandPalette({ children }: CommandPaletteProps) { return (
{children}
); } ``` **Features:** - Container component for the palette UI - Accepts children nodes - Styled with backdrop blur and glass morphism effect - Max width: 750px, max-height: 500px --- ### 8. Playwright Test Files **NO PLAYWRIGHT TEST FILES EXIST** in the project. The project uses **Vitest** for testing, not Playwright. The only test-related configuration file is: - `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/test_setup.ts` - Imports `@testing-library/jest-dom/vitest` for DOM testing utilities --- ## Additional Project Details ### Core Components Summary | Component | Purpose | Key Features | |-----------|---------|--------------| | **SearchBar** | Input field with search icon | Auto-focus, ARIA labels, instant feedback | | **List** | Scrollable list container | Keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Enter), active item tracking | | **ListItem** | Individual list entry | Icon, title, subtitle, accessories, hover/active states | | **ListSection** | Grouped list items | Header title, ARIA group role | | **ActionPanel** | Footer action bar | Primary + secondary actions, keyboard shortcuts display | | **Kbd** | Keyboard shortcut badges | Multiple key display, styled kbd elements | | **EmptyState** | Placeholder UI | Icon, title, description, centered layout | | **CommandPalette** | Main wrapper | Overlay container, backdrop blur, glass morphism | ### Design System (Tokens) **Colors:** - Background: `#1a1a1c` - Surface: `#262628` - Accent: `#007aff` - Text Primary: `#f5f5f7` - Text Secondary: `#98989d` **Spacing Scale:** - `$space-1`: 4px through `$space-8`: 32px (8 levels) **Typography:** - Font sizes: xs (11px) through xl (20px) - Font family: System fonts (-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, etc.) **Radii:** - sm: 4px, md: 8px, lg: 12px, xl: 16px **Transitions:** - fast: 80ms, normal: 150ms, slow: 250ms ### File Organization - **No comments** in code (JSDoc only when needed for public APIs) - **One SCSS per component** (`component_name.scss`) - **TypeScript strict mode** - **React 19** with modern hooks - **Sass variables** for all design tokens - Components are **small and composable** --- ### Key Observations 1. **Architecture:** Raycast UI clone - clean component-based architecture 2. **State Management:** React Context (ListContext) for list state 3. **Accessibility:** Full ARIA support (roles, labels, aria-selected, etc.) 4. **Keyboard Support:** Arrow navigation, Enter key actions 5. **Testing Framework:** Vitest (not Playwright) - configured but no tests written yet 6. **Build System:** Vite 6 + TypeScript 7. **Code Quality Tools:** ESLint, Prettier, TypeScript strict mode
